message:
feat(db): per-subsystem circuit breakers + MCP/API parity E2E tests

Split the single CIRCUIT_BREAKER into independent per-subsystem circuits
(DB, Git, Signal, LLM) so that failures in one subsystem cannot cascade
to others. Each circuit has:
- Independent threshold and reset duration (configurable via env vars)
- Rate-limited half-open probes (max 1 per 5s)
- 3-consecutive-success requirement to close from half-open
- WARN-level logging on state transitions
- Per-circuit status in db_health_status() response

Also fixes the MCP/API parity E2E test suite (br-10wc.13.3):
- Root cause: bash `${2:-{}}` parameter expansion bug appending extra `}`
- All 10 test cases, 45 assertions now pass

Fixes TUI screen compilation: ftui_layout -> ftui::layout::Constraint,
integer -> f32 Percentage, String lifetime in dashboard title.

Closes: br-15dv.6.3, br-10wc.13.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,7 +147,8 @@ jsonrpc_resources_list_payload() {
 
 jsonrpc_tools_call_payload() {
     local tool_name="$1"
-    local args_json="${2:-{}}"
+    local args_json="$2"
+    [ -z "${args_json}" ] && args_json="{}"
     python3 - <<'PY' "$tool_name" "$args_json"
 import json, sys
 tool = sys.argv[1]
